title: SBooster Official
description: This modpack is crafted for competitive Minecraft players who demand performance, precision, and power. Whether you're grinding leaderboards, dominating PvP arenas, or streaming to your audience — this pack gives you the edge.
body:
## ⚔️ SBooster – PvP & FPS Modpack | **🪶Full Feather Standalone Support**

**SBooster** is a sleek, client-side Minecraft modpack tailored for players who prioritize **high FPS**, **PvP readiness**, and **quality-of-life improvements**. Whether you're climbing leaderboards, dueling in crystal PvP, or creating content, SBooster is designed to deliver top-tier performance with minimal clutter.



---

### 🔧 Key Features

* **FPS & Performance Optimizations** – Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other micro-optimizations for buttery-smooth gameplay.
* **PvP-Focused Utilities** – Includes Totem Counter, Crystal Optimizer, Auto Reconnect, Clean F3, and customizable HUDs.
* **Enhanced Network Support** – Features ViaFabricPlus, Raknetify, and Packet Fixer for smoother multiplayer and cross-version connectivity.
* **Voice Chat & Replay Support** – ReplayMod and Simple Voice Chat make this modpack ideal for creators and team-based PvP.
* **Streamlined UI & QoL Tweaks** – Clean statistics screens, saved inventories, mouse tweaks, and chat enhancements keep your interface efficient and distraction-free.
* **Security & Stability** – Built-in crash exploit protection, packet filtering, and anti-chat-report features ensure a safer experience.
* 🪶 **Full Feather Standalone Support** – Optimized and tested for use with the **[Feather Standalone Client](https://feathermc.com/)**, giving you integrated performance boosts, PvP tools, and a streamlined setup with no extra config needed.

---

### 📦 Technical Details

* 🔧 Based on **Fabric 1.21.5+**
* 💻 **Client-side only** — compatible with vanilla and most multiplayer servers
* 📦 Includes **embedded mods**, no additional downloads required
* ⚡ Pre-tuned for **low latency**, **fast loading**, and **stable performance out of the box**

---
